primary_catalyst.description: Flat session on exceptionally low volume (-2.69 vol z). No NVDA-specific catalyst identified. Market in wait-and-see mode ahead of expected Iran-war-related headlines and the subsequent April 7 ceasefire announcement. Options positioning (P/C shift from 0.53 to 0.78) showed growing caution ahead of May earnings.
